summary: Frontend testing of Streamlit 'Mapa dos Contentores' page. Professional design is working correctly without block duplication. CRITICAL BUG: Drag-and-drop position persistence is broken due to iframe sandbox security restrictions.

minor.issue: PostgreSQL was not running in test env - had to install and configure manually

ui_bugs.issue: Position persistence fails due to iframe sandbox restrictions - JavaScript cannot navigate parent window to set 'contentor_move' query param

integration_issues.flow: Contentor drag-and-drop -> position save to DB
integration_issues.issue: SecurityError: The frame attempting navigation of the top-level window is sandboxed. guardarPosicaoNoBackend() fails with 'allow-top-navigation' not set.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix iframe sandbox issue for drag-and-drop position persistence. The st.components.html() iframe cannot navigate parent window. Options: 1) Use st.markdown with st.components.v1.html and pass allow_navigation=True if supported, 2) Use Streamlit's st.experimental_rerun with session_state instead of query_params, 3) Use postMessage API to communicate between iframe and parent
Alternative approach: Instead of URL navigation, use window.parent.postMessage() to send position updates, then handle them in Streamlit via st.experimental_get_query_params alternative
critical_code_review_comments: Line 1888-1895 in app.py: guardarPosicaoNoBackend() uses window.parent.location.href = parentUrl.toString() which fails due to iframe sandbox restrictions
The st.components.html() creates a sandboxed iframe without 'allow-top-navigation' permission
Workaround needed: Use alternative mechanism like st.session_state with hidden Streamlit elements or postMessage API
seed_data_creation: Created CT-TEST-001 contentor for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: PostgreSQL 15 was installed and started manually. Database embriovet created with tables from SQL scripts. Password for admin user was regenerated. The critical issue is iframe sandbox preventing drag-and-drop persistence - visual drag works but position not saved to DB.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Streamlit's st.components.html() creates an iframe with sandbox attribute that does not include 'allow-top-navigation'. When JavaScript inside the iframe tries to navigate the parent window (window.parent.location.href = ...), it throws SecurityError.
rca_of_the_issue.error_message: SecurityError: Failed to set the 'href' property on 'Location': The current window does not have permission to navigate the target frame to 'http://localhost:8501/?contentor_move=...'
reproduction_steps: 3. Drag any contentor block to a new position
4. Observe browser console - SecurityError is logged
5. Position is NOT persisted to database
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Need to use alternative communication mechanism between iframe and parent. Options: 1) Streamlit's st.session_state with hidden elements, 2) postMessage API, 3) Custom Streamlit component with proper permissions

features_tested.mapa_contentores_visual: PASS - Professional design, grid layout, no duplication
features_tested.drag_and_drop_visual: PASS - Contentors can be dragged visually
features_tested.drag_and_drop_persistence: FAIL - Position NOT saved to database due to iframe sandbox
features_tested.criar_contentor: PASS - New contentors created and saved to DB
features_tested.ver_stock: PASS - Stock page displays correctly with filters
features_tested.editar_apagar_buttons: VISIBLE - Buttons present but click handling needs Streamlit form submit
